summary: Comprehensive testing of ReservationDetailModal completed. Backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) and Frontend UI all working correctly. Double-click on booking bar opens full-screen modal with all 7 tabs, folio operations (payment, cari transfer, agency payment), quick actions, and proper data display.
critical_code_review_comments: All code follows best practices with proper error handling and data-testid attributes
Backend endpoints properly validate user authentication and tenant context
Frontend modal lazy-loaded for performance optimization
MongoDB _id properly excluded from API responses
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo booking data
context_for_next_testing_agent: ReservationDetailModal fully functional. Booking ID dc36f089-75bc-4d83-a94f-7d0558abb88d used for testing. Payment of 100 TL was recorded during UI testing. Cari accounts exist: ABC Turizm, XYZ Seyahat (pre-created), plus TEST_Cari_* accounts created during API tests.

double_click_modal_open.details: Double-click on booking bar in calendar opens ReservationDetailModal

genel_bilgiler_tab.details: Shows booking dates (20 Mar - 21 Mar 2026), room (Suite 123), status (Onaylandi), channel (direct), guest info with edit capability

misafirler_tab.details: Shows list of guests with avatar, name, email, VIP badge if applicable

folyolar_tab.details: Shows summary cards (Toplam, Masraflar, Odemeler, Bakiye). Buttons: Odeme Al, Cariye Aktar, Acente Odemesi all functional

odeme_al_button.details: Opens payment form with Tutar, Odeme Yontemi (Nakit/Kredi Karti/Havale/Online), Odeme Tipi (On Odeme/Depozito/Ara Odeme/Final Odeme), Referans, Kaydet/Iptal buttons

cariye_aktar_button.details: Opens cari transfer form with Tutar, Cari Hesap dropdown (loads from API), Aciklama, Aktar/Iptal buttons

acente_odemesi_button.details: Opens agency payment form with Tutar, Acente Adi, Referans, Kaydet/Iptal buttons

gunluk_fiyatlar_tab.details: Shows daily rates table with Tarih, Fiyat (TL) columns, Toplam row, and Duzenle button for editing

ek_ucretler_tab.details: Shows extra charges list, Ekle button for adding new charges with Aciklama, Kategori, Tutar, Adet fields

notlar_tab.details: Shows notes textarea, note type selector (Genel/Onemli/Dahili/Misafir Istegi), Ekle button, existing notes list

gecmis_tab.details: Shows activity/audit log timeline with action type, actor, timestamp, and details

left_sidebar_quick_actions.details: Shows guest summary, financial summary (TOPLAM/ODENEN/BAKIYE), and quick action buttons: Erken Giris, Gec Cikis, VIP Yap/Kaldir, No-Show

close_button.details: X button closes modal and returns to calendar

backend_full_detail_api.details: GET /api/pms/reservations/{id}/full-detail returns booking, guest, room, folios, charges, payments, extra_charges, notes, history, daily_rates, guests, summary

backend_record_payment_api.details: POST /api/pms/reservations/{id}/record-payment works with cash, card, bank_transfer methods

backend_cari_accounts_api.details: GET/POST /api/pms/cari-accounts works for listing and creating cari accounts
